name: agent-skills
description: Multi-domain skill and agent library. Kaggle: 12 competition skills + 3 agents (EDA, baselines, Optuna, feature engineering, ensembling, pseudo-labeling). SDLC: 17 agents + 4 skills across 4 phases (requirements → architecture → implementation → review). Research: paper writing with live web search for guidelines, literature review, and venue selection across IEEE, ACM, Nature, Springer, Elsevier, NeurIPS, ICML, and more.
